lede: A look at May 12 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Vasilije Adžić and Emily VanCamp, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: May 2024 solar storms
events.desc: Middle/end of the May 2024 solar storms, the most powerful set of geomagnetic storms since the 2003 Halloween solar storms.

events.title: WannaCry ransomware attack
events.desc: The WannaCry ransomware attack impacts over 400,000 computers worldwide, targeting computers of the United Kingdom's National Health Services and Telefónica computers.

events.title: 2015 Philadelphia train derailment
events.desc: A train derailment in Philadelphia, United States, kills eight people and injures more than 200.

events.title: May 2015 Nepal earthquake
events.desc: Massive Nepal earthquake kills 218 people and injures more than 3,500.

events.title: Vietnam War
events.desc: Vietnam War: North Vietnamese and Viet Cong forces attack Australian troops defending Fire Support Base Coral.

events.title: Konrad Zuse
events.desc: Konrad Zuse presents the Z3, the world's first working programmable, fully automatic computer, in Berlin.

events.title: Norge (airship)
events.desc: The Italian-built airship Norge becomes the first vessel to fly over the North Pole.

events.title: Ottoman Tunisia
events.desc: In North Africa, Tunisia becomes a French protectorate.

events.title: American Civil War
events.desc: American Civil War: Union Army troops occupy Baton Rouge, Louisiana.

events.title: Donner Party
events.desc: The Donner Party of pioneers departs Independence, Missouri for California, on what will become a year-long journey of hardship and cannibalism.

births.name: Yogi Berra
births.line: American baseball player, coach, and manager (died 2015)

births.name: Frank Wilson (politician)
births.line: English-Australian politician, ninth Premier of Western Australia (died 1918)

births.name: José de la Mar
births.line: Peruvian military leader, President of Peru (died 1830)

deaths.text: John Dryden, English poet, playwright, and critic

observances.text: Christian feast day: Blessed Joan of Portugal
Christian feast day: Dominic de la Calzada
Christian feast day: Gregory Dix (Church of England)
Christian feast day: Nereus, Achilleus, Domitilla, and Pancras
